constraints.name: Thread stack size
constraints.description: Zephyr 线程栈大小需通过 Kconfig 配置

constraints.name: Device tree binding
constraints.description: 设备必须通过 device tree 绑定

constraints.name: Workqueue vs task
constraints.description: Zephyr workqueue 模型与 FreeRTOS task 模型不同

constraints.name: Kconfig dependency
constraints.description: Kconfig 选项有依赖关系，必须检查
